name: proofsheet
description: Image generation, refinement, and reusable themes for blog posts, slides, newsletters, and anything else needing a real image. Backed by either Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image) or OpenAI (gpt-image-1), with provider picked per call. Includes /welcome onboarding, interactive art direction (/image), surgical refinement of existing images (/refine), and a custom theme builder (/new-theme).
